text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finding out about the changes Nishino
Flower is going through, I decide to reassess her
running style in order to make a new training
regimen. However...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I just can't run right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's clearly worried about how slow her times are
compared to before. Still, her concern is
understandable.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how to put it. I try to imagine how I
want to move in my head...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But my legs step forward before I'm ready, and
they won't move anything like I want them to...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Does that make sense?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's experiencing some disconnect with
her body. Fortunately, that's nothing to be upset
over.
choice_data_list: This growth spurt can only be a good thing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you really think so?
choice_data_list:
Of course! Once you overcome this, you'll be
stronger than ever!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll do my best to master this new running
style!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer's so kind. But I can't let them do all the
work for me.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'll improve... I'm sure of it. I've just got to do my
best to get past this and—)

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Of course, there will be difficulties she'll have to
face too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? That sounds like the school doctor and
Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
It's true that the more an athlete grows, the more
muscle they gain, which can lead to improvement.
However...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
An athlete's motor control is a delicate thing.
Some fail to adapt to their body's changes and
end up not being able to draw out their full
potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pitter-patter...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Hm? If I recall, running isn't allowed in the
hallways, correct? I could be wrong, though—I'm
still wrapping my head around all the academy
rules. In any case, while I do have some
concerns...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
In general, this is a very good thing that's
happening. Keep a close eye on Nishino Flower
during training, and do your best together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's the only one who can figure out how to get
a sense for her changing body, but I can still
support her as she tries. Speaking of which...
choice_data_list:
Doctor, could I get your honest opinion on this
training regimen?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(If I can't figure out how to adapt to my body, it
won't just be about improving anymore. I might
not even be able to continue as a racer...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll be able to do it... What do you
think, little flowers?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I started cultivating this flower bed because I
wanted to show it to Trainer. I've been secretly
planting flowers in it for a while now, but...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh? Did this cineraria get frostbitten?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Please don't wilt any more than this, okay? You'll
make me even sadder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's from Trainer... And they want me to meet
them in their office?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Drip, drop...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was rain in the forecast today?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hope it's not too bad. I heard plants can get root
rot from too much rain.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Every time I run in a race, I'll add more flowers.
And once it's full of beautiful blossoms, it'll be
time to show it off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: She doesn't want any more flowers to wilt, hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fshhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer. Um, you wanted to talk to me?
choice_data_list: I've got a new training regimen for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pass Nishino Flower a regimen catered to her
growth. But that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What are these "A" and "B" labels for?
choice_data_list:
They're different exercise patterns we can
switch between at any time.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I created the regimen after interviewing athletes
who also continued to grow after becoming
race-ready. I got their trainers' opinions, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right now, these exercises are only rough drafts
to line up with her predicted growth, but I want to
show her we can adapt quickly to anything that
pops up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You came up with all of this in such a short
amount of time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This kind of thing would have been difficult for
me to do before I met Nishino Flower, but after
coming so far alongside her...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list:
I said you'd be able to improve once you
overcome this, but there's something I forgot to
add.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have the confidence to say it before, but
now I'm confident in my ability to support and
guide her through this.
choice_data_list: As long as we're together, it'll all be okay!
As long as we're together, it'll all be okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. You really are such a wonderful trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You've been working so hard for my sake, and
here I am down in the dumps.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I think I turned into a bit of a scaredy-cat. But I'm
fine now!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work hard with you so I can beat my
old self!
choice_data_list: Here's to a new and improved Nishino Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a while spent discussing our future plans
with renewed resolve, Nishino Flower and I step
out of my office.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Omigosh!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky?! What happened to you?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was taking a nap, y'see. Took me a while
to realize.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? What didn't you realize?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Gasp! It's pouring outside!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh no! My flower bed!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Your flower bed's fine.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I just walked by. Some kind person's put a tarp
over it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's such a relief!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wonder who it was. I hope I can thank them
properly one day.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run out just to make sure the flowers
are okay!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I told her they were fine. Well, what matters is
that she's feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Cat got your tongue?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whatever could you mean?
